utterances.text: Quick standup. The checkout bug from yesterday is fixed — it was a race in the payment webhook handler, and the fix is already on staging.
Nice. I'm still on the search indexing work, about seventy percent done. Should wrap tomorrow unless the reindex surfaces more bad rows.
Reminder that the production deploy window is Friday at ten a.m. If the indexing work isn't merged by Thursday evening it waits until next week.
One blocker: I need someone to review the webhook fix pull request today. It's small, maybe two hundred lines.
